pr.title: Add Combined Int6 + QAT + Sliding Window submission

output.summary: Combines Int6 quant with late-K passthrough, late-stage QAT, and sliding-window eval plus cosine warmdown and Muon/AdamW tweaks for robust compression.
techniques: Int6 quant with late-K passthrough and final-30% QAT STE
Batched sliding-window evaluation with overtone init and resid_mix phase transition
Cosine warmdown plus Muon decoupled decay and AdamW for embeddings
